name: noggin
description: A working-memory tree for in-flight work — your second brain for the stuff you can't fit in your head.

interface.longDescription: Noggin gives an agent a small, persistent tree of in-flight work — push when you go on a side-quest so you don't lose your place, add a child to remember a todo without diving in, goto an item to make it active, mark it done when finished, and drop notes as you go. Items have a title, a done flag, and append-only notes. Backed by a single YAML file (~/.noggin.yaml) via a small CLI; the file is the source of truth.
defaultPrompt: Pause this — push a side-quest to chase X.
Add a todo under what I'm working on so I don't forget.
Where was I? Show my noggin.
